description: Legal record (#37) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (ll. 1-11 on f. 14r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 21 Shevat 5322 AM (1562 CE), a chronological leap of 13 years before the previous entry on 13v (PGPID 41077). Shelomo Feyruz appeared before a session of the beit din at the synagogue (probably Dār Simḥa) and summoned ʿAbd al-Jawād al-Kohen over rumors that the latter he had been spreading about him. The court rules that ʿAbd al-Jawād is incorrect in spreading rumors and that "the law is with/upon" Shelomo in this matter (עליה אלדין). ʿAbd al-Jawād then swears an oath that he did not/does not believe the rumors he was spreading. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
